description: Fragment of a Fatimid official report, apparently referring to plunder taken from Crusaders. Wide line spacing. The end of one line is preserved: "[...] two swords from the accursed Franks and a quiver." Reused for Hebrew jottings in a rudimentary hand and drawings (of a ḥanukiya?).
tags: arabic military report, weapons, Arabic crusades
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
